item.dc:creator: Chewi42

item.title: Crochet? How cliche!
item.description:
Been fighting major depression for a decade since my parents died. My partner stuck through it with me but it's been a rough ride
House mates are our best friends and know how much I love all things cute and soft.
Those damn woobles were a pain to find
Look at him!
So cute I love him and he's mine!
Guess this is the start of something new! RIP Wallet Most viral update: HOLY COW this is amazing ya'll are amazing thank you!!!!!!! I'll be sure to make a follow up post but seriously THANK YOU!!!
item.dc:creator: hookedonyarnics

item.title: Some programming humor for a niche audience
item.description:
1
2. Them: You can't code with only 3 keys Me:
3.
4
5. Jeeeez, them laptops....
6. That's amazing
7
8. Shouldn't have done that
9. I HALP
10. Are you a DEV or a QA?
11
12. Oh, shit
13
14. Yo, this guy approached me!
And finally I would like to share something from myself. I've been working very hard on Stanley Parable-like game with a touch of GladOS from Portal called Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)/ The demo made to TOP 10 on Steam's demo trending tab! And it features witty signs like this one here. "What?", I hear you ask. "I can read funny signs for free?" YES, yes you can! Try it now on Steam and please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse Thank you, and if this dump made you smile at least once, I am happy with it! : )
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: If I had this I’d also have 30 cats.
item.dc:creator: jwillustrat

item.title: The bloodline ends with me.
item.description: My ex has kids and I thought I could handle it. We were together for 3 years and it made me realize what a soul sucking experience it was to have kids. Every thought, every action revolved around these children who have no understanding or appreciation for what you do for them. I'm very thankful for the life lesson that experience taught me. Sorry mom, the family name dies with me.
item.dc:creator: stillnotawake

item.title: Triss Merigold Body Paint - MCroft07
item.description: I painted this on myself using a mirror (and brushes). First time painting anyone from The Witcher, but wanted to finally do it since I've had so many suggestions for it :) I exist on the internet here: Instagram: www.instagram.com/mcroft07 Twitter: www.twitter.com/MCroft07 Tiktok: www.tiktok.com/@mcroft07 Twitch: www.twitch.tv/mcroft07
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: Images of Note: Pictures that Seb hates
item.description:
Sound on if you wanna see the weirdest bullshit
Poor Penny
Young people existing is apparently the worst thing that can happen these days
I know where that bridge is and I wanna go there.
Radio doesn't die because audio is a versatile yet cheap and easy format
(it's true)
Children are like this.
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii Come see me go mad over pixels.
Not them, they look very polite
babies! creatures even!
(I fail to see the issue)
:3
:o
o7
never
Sound on, rip headphones users
:c
:3
Yes
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii We can now sacrifice people to the Volcano!
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay For STREEEEEEEEEEAM: http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii
